title: Explain deprecated annotations
description: Deprecated annotations should always include a clear explanation for their deprecation. This helps developers understand the reason for deprecation and guides them toward better alternatives, improving code maintainability and clarity.
recommendation: Add a rationale or guidance in the Javadoc or annotation when marking code as deprecated.

checks.message: Avoid using @Deprecated annotation. Add a rationale or guidance in the Javadoc or annotation when marking code as deprecated.
